items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is the overall better striker and a far better kickboxer in his matchup.
items.quote: Should be a mostly striking match-up, and he's just the overall better striker. He's a far better kickboxer.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev has seemingly solid takedown defense.
items.quote: The takedown defense is seemingly solid.

items.claim: Axel Sola showed great cardio and never stopped moving in his previous hard fight.
items.quote: He never stopped moving. The cardio looked great. He never quit on himself.

items.claim: Axel Sola's relentless pressure will break Bonfim.
items.quote: I think Axel Sola moves forward, gets takedowns, stays in Bonfim's face, keeps the pressure on, and ultimately breaks Bonfim.
